projectDescription: A copy/paste adversarial decision protocol for AI systems that converts uncertain plans, artifacts, and choices into a forced verdict, one executable next action, and reusable machine state.
keyFeatures: Forced verdict on every input: DO NOW, DO LATER, or DISCARD — never 'depends'
One concrete [NEXT] executable action per decision item
Machine-readable snapshot output for stateless AI-to-AI ping-pong continuation
Three input modes: PLAN (pressure-test), ARTIFACT (audit), TOOL+TARGET (analysis)
Reality probes and falsification gates for evidence-bound closure
Falsification Debt tracking for unresolved critical drivers
Delta-only peer validation for iterative AI-to-AI decision refinement
Batch processing with dependency modeling and resource concurrency
Configurable operating profile: ExecCapability, ClosePolicy, AskUser switch
REPORT and REPORT LITE read-only render passes over prior snapshots
publicApiSurface: <<<B keep_open= expire_days= exec_capability= close_policy= ssot_scale= resource_pool=>>> batch header
<<<I id= title= keep_open= expire_days= depends_on= uses= reversibility=>>> item wrapper
<<<PLAN>>> — bullet list or numbered steps payload
<<<ARTIFACT>>> — prompt, document, protocol, code, or spec payload
<<<TOOL>>> + <<<TARGET>>> — named evaluation method applied to a target artifact
<<<PREV>>> — previous [ITEM id=...] block for delta-only continuation
<<<CHANGE>>> — observable change declaration to revisit SIMULATED-closed items
REPORT — read-only human render pass over a valid snapshot
REPORT LITE — 1-page scan-first summary render pass
STATE: DECISION.TEST.FINAL — required machine output state header
[QUEUE] — execution scan surface with id, state, verdict, impact, urgency, gate, step1
[ITEM id=...] — per-item decision block with panel, steps, probes, delta, and derived fields
[PANEL] — global batch metadata: protocol, policy switches, validity, governance counts
[HUMAN_TABLE] — derived markdown table for human reading (not machine state)
dominant_gate values: FAIL_FAST_CUT, FALSIFICATION, DEBT_CEILING, FRAGILITY, DEPENDENCY_BLOCK, CONFIDENCE_CAP, EXTERNAL_BLOCK, REDESIGN_TRIGGER, SCORE_TRIAGE, NONE
Lifecycle states: DRAFT, ACTIVE, STANDBY, PROBING, CLOSED, EXPIRED, DISCARDED
Verdict tokens: DO NOW, DO LATER, DISCARD
